title: AML Agents Briefing — Friday, 01 May 2026
script: Welcome to the AML Agents Briefing. This is a stub episode — the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret is not configured for the daily-briefing GitHub Actions workflow. Once it is, this slot will carry a three-to-five minute conversational summary of the day's most material APAC financial-crime developments, drawn from the same news, obligations, and horizon-scanning feeds you see in the app. Goodbye for now.
